channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Holy Shit, Sigourney Weaver Might Fly an X-Wing in The Mandalorian and Grogu: Watch the New Trailer
item.description: 🚀🎶 Sigourney Weaver taking the galaxy by storm in The Mandalorian and Grogu? Count us in! Watch the epic trailer now! #SlayingInSpace ✨

item.title: Snail Mail played Brooklyn Paramount with Sharp Pins & @ (pics, video)
item.description: 🐌💌 Snail Mail rocked Brooklyn Paramount with Sharp Pins & more! Check out the epic photos and videos 🎸🔥 #LiveMusicMagic

item.title: Massive Attack’s First Song in Six Years Features Tom Waits
item.description: 🎶 Legendary collab alert! Massive Attack teams up with Tom Waits for their first track in 6 years! 🔥 #MusicLegendsUnite 🎤

item.title: Neko Case’s Thelma & Louise Musical to Debut This Fall
item.description: Buckle up, music lovers! 🎶 Neko Case is bringing us a Thelma & Louise musical this fall! Who's ready for this ride? 🚗🎤 #NekoCase #ThelmaAndLouiseMusical

item.title: Charli XCX Is Making a Rock Album
item.description: 🎸 Get ready to rock out with @charli_xcx! She's switching things up and we're totally here for it! 🤘 #CharliXCX #RockAlbum
